author: Nicholas S.
text: Love Gaslight!!! Great food, great vibes, awesome local beers on tap. Bartenders and servers super friendly. Almost always have some local music going on and the smashburger is divine!

author: Claire K.
text: Smash burgers! Service! Really accommodating and attentive to our group. Kids liked it, adults liked it.

author: Mike B.
text: New Homemade Onion Rings are the BEST Orings I've ever had! Amazingly good!! A must try!!

author: Catt A. (Elite)
text: Stopped here after a playground and fishing excursion. We were excited to try the burgers that were highly recommended. The atmosphere is very steam punk and casual.

author: Gabrielle A.
text: Since Gaslight's official reopening, it has become my favorite eatery on 1st Ave in Atlantic Highlands. The SMASHBURGERS are seriously the best ones in the entire area by miles.

author: Damian D. (Elite)
text: Pretty good smashburgers, icy cold beer, pleasant bar staff. Quite a nice spot in a lovely setting.

author: James C.
text: 5 stars because of how shocked I was how good the food was & beer selection. Wednesday open mic night which the local talent was pretty amazing.

author: Colin
text: Has everything from food to drinks with the diversity of the bar and restaurant and they change the menu every month

author: Matt F.
text: Great food and great beer selection. I had their smash burger and it was top notch.

author: L C.
text: Gaslight had closed their doors a number of years ago... stopped there and the hostess was incompetent.
